name: Gunfire Girl: Zombie Hunt
short_description: This is an extremely exciting VR shooting game. It provides players with a brand new shooting experience, allowing players to feel endless stimulus and fun in the process of destroying zombies.
detailed_description:
This is an extremely exciting VR shooting game. It provides players with a brand new shooting experience, allowing players to feel endless stimulus and fun in the process of destroying zombies.



In this game, players will play a brave warrior, crossing various maps to eliminate all zombies in the scene. Each map has different environments and challenges, allowing players to maintain freshness and challenge. In the game, players only need to clenched the gun in their hands and aimed at the zombies in front of them for shooting. They need to pay attention to observing the surrounding environment, and check the remaining amount and blood of their bullets in time. Do not expose themselves in a dangerous environment. At the same time, players also need to pay attention to the number and location of zombies in order to better eliminate them. When the player eliminates zombies, he can get more bullets. After destroying all the zombies in the scene, the game won.
In short, this VR shooting game is very fun and exciting. It provides players with a new shooting experience, allowing players to feel endless stimulus and fun in the process of destroying zombies. If you like shooting games and zombie themes, then this game must not be missed!



Operation method:
Kill All Zombies
Move: Left handle up / down
Turn: Right handle left/right
Pause : Menu key
View : Left handle grip
Fire： Right handle trigger
Jump： Left handle trigger

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
